items.title: Bitwise acquires Chorus One, potentially paving way for more staked ETFs
items.whyYouShouldCare: Bitwise's acquisition of Chorus One signals potential growth in staked ETFs, which could enhance institutional interest in Solana's staking ecosystem.

items.title: State of Marinade Q4 2025: Institutions Select Marinade
items.whyYouShouldCare: Marinade's Q4 report highlights institutional adoption, indicating a growing preference for Solana-based staking solutions that could boost liquidity and network usage.

items.title: Polymarket users favor Meteora in bets over ZachXBT crypto takedown
items.whyYouShouldCare: Polymarket's user bets on Meteora reflect shifting sentiment in the crypto landscape, which could influence trading dynamics and liquidity flows within Solana.
